pages.text: A reading of notable tributes. Values shift the six hungers from $(l:2_cradle/six_hungers)Tributes & the Six Hungers$(); the recipe viewer and biomancy's own tags hold the full list.
pages.title: A Table of Offerings

pages.text: $(bold)Toward a clean, calm spawn:$()$(br)$(li)$(flesh)Rabbit's Foot$() — +1000 Success in one item. The hidden lucky charm; stockpile it.$(li)$(flesh)Totem of Undying$() — 2500 Life Energy, big Success, deep negative Hostility. The "superior sacrifice".$(li)$(flesh)Golden Apple$() / $(flesh)Enchanted Golden Apple$() — strong negative Hostility.$(li)$(flesh)Cleansing Serum$() — the disease purge: large negative Disease.

$(bold)Toward fuel and bulk:$()$(br)$(li)$(flesh)Raw meat$() (any) — biomass and a little Success. The staple feed.$(li)$(flesh)Healing Additive$() / $(flesh)Rejuvenation Serum$() / $(flesh)Absorption Stimulant$() — clean Life Energy.$(li)$(flesh)Nether Star$() — 15,000 Life Energy, but +100 Disease and +100 Hostility with it. Vast fuel for an ugly outcome.

$(bold)Toward corruption — feed on purpose only:$()$(br)$(li)$(flesh)Primordial Core$() — +100 Anomaly in one item; the fast track to Primordial blobs (also +50 Disease).$(li)$(flesh)Frenzy Serum$() — +1000 Hostility; a deliberate Hungry-spawn switch.$(li)$(flesh)Toxin Gland$() / $(flesh)Rotten Flesh$() — Disease feeders.$(li)$(flesh)Ender Pearl$() — pushes both Hostility and Anomaly up.
pages.title: The Dark Offerings

pages.text: $(bold)Watch the surprises.$() $(flesh)Cake$() adds Disease despite seeming wholesome. $(flesh)Withered Marrow$() is a strict downgrade on plain Marrow. And drinks count — milk, honey and the pack's teas all carry tributes through their effects. When in doubt, feed one and listen for the Cradle's approval.
pages.title: A Caution
